Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class ConfigVariable.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.ConfigVariable.Builder
Enclosing class:
ConfigVariable
public static final class ConfigVariable.Builder extends Object
Helps creating a new ConfigVariable.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ConfigVariable
    build()
    Creates the variable.
    ConfigVariable.Builder
    withCompleter(org.jline.reader.Completer completer)
    Sets the shell completer to show the tab-completion candidates when setting the variable to a new value.
    ConfigVariable.Builder

    Sets the expected values for the variable.
    ConfigVariable.Builder

    Sets the default value for the variable.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • withParser

      public ConfigVariable.Builder withParser(Function<String[],Object> parser)
      Sets the function to transform the shell arguments into the value stored in the variable.

      Given a variable v, the following expression must be true: 

       parser.apply(new String[]{v.getValue().toString()}).equals(v.getValue())
      Parameters:
      parser - a function to parse the value from shell arguments
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withInitialValue

      public ConfigVariable.Builder withInitialValue(Object value)
      Sets the default value for the variable. When the shell configuration is reset, the variable will be set to this value.
      Parameters:
      value - the default value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withExpectedValues

      public ConfigVariable.Builder withExpectedValues(Object... values)
      Sets the expected values for the variable. The shell will present them as tab-completion candidates when setting the variable to a new value.
      Parameters:
      values - the expected values of the variable
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withCompleter

      public ConfigVariable.Builder withCompleter(org.jline.reader.Completer completer)
      Sets the shell completer to show the tab-completion candidates when setting the variable to a new value.
      Parameters:
      completer - the shell completer for the possible variable values
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public ConfigVariable build()
      Creates the variable.
      Returns:
      the new variable.
